titleJa: AI agent identity は認証認可の control plane になり始めた
titleEn: Agent identity is becoming the control plane for authentication and authorization
summaryJa: Microsoft Entra Agent ID、Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity、Google Cloud Agent Identity、MCP/A2A、Okta/Auth0 の一次情報を横断すると、agent は単なる service account ではなく、ネイティブ identity、delegated authorization、protocol auth、governance を束ねた control plane として扱われ始めている。本稿はその収束点を整理し、各サービスがどの方向性に属するかと、対向サービスがどのように agent に権限を与えるのかを比較する。
summaryEn: Across primary sources from Microsoft Entra Agent ID, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity, Google Cloud Agent Identity, MCP/A2A, Okta, and Auth0, agents are increasingly being treated not as generic service accounts but as a dedicated control plane that combines native identities, delegated authorization, protocol-layer trust, and governance. This briefing maps the main directions, places major services into those buckets, and explains how downstream systems actually grant permissions to agents.
